strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, aligning with required AI experience
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) demonstrating initiative and craftsmanship
concerns: Lack of explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright — key required technologies in the stack
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java usage in recent roles despite being a secondary requirement
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep full-stack expertise, strong AI-agent experience, and a proven track record of building scalable, testable systems — all core to the role. His open-source work and tooling focus reflect the craftsmanship needed for internal automation. However, the absence of confirmed experience with Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin/Java raises gaps in stack alignment, and limited German may impact team integration.
